chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: Next element is heading element.  If I want to create different heading on my page, I already have tags for it.  We have 6 different heading tags in HTML.  We take them from H1 to H6.  H1 is the biggest heading.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: If I write anything in this, it will be displayed in the largest size.  Second tag is H2, third is H3, fourth is H4, fifth is H5 and sixth is H6.  These tags decrease in size.  If you want to give the smallest heading, it will be in H6 and if you want to give the biggest heading, it will be in H1.  These 6 different levels of section headings are represented.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: Let's see how the heading is represented.  Let's say I open a page named Avengers Wikipedia.  I open this page.  The title of this page is the biggest heading.  The smallest heading will be the biggest heading and the next level will be the smallest heading.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: The same level will be the cast.  If I want to write in H1 heading, I will write my main title.  The next biggest heading will be in H2.  If I want to give any other subheading in H2, I will write it in H3.  This is how we create different levels of heading.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: If I talk about my HTML file, I can write H1 here.  This is my opening tag and this is my closing tag.  Now I can write my main heading in this.  Let's say my main heading is Avengers.  This is how I display my main heading.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: If I want to display their small subheadings, I will display all the subheadings in H2.  I can write my Avengers name or Iron Man's name.  If you don't know about Avengers, this is a random name that I am writing.  I can write Thor here.  I can write Hulk in the next line.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: If I talk about my web browser, the main heading on my page is getting bigger.  I wrote this in H1.  The headings written in H2 are smaller than the headings in H1.  So, we will write our main heading in H1 and smaller than that in H2.  If I want to write in H3, I will display anything in a smaller font.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: This is my smaller heading.  Headings in H1, H2, and H3 have their own default size.  Headings in H1 will always have the same default size.  Headings in H2 will always have the same default size.  Headings in H3 will also have the same default size.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: In the same way, 6 default sizes are already defined for 6 headings.  Usually, when we are writing CSS, we can change the font for the rest of the text.  But, we do not change the font size for the headings in H1, H2, and H3.  Because, when the font size is already defined, we do not play with the rules of HTML.  So, we do not change the default size of the headings in maximum cases.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: If we want to write our HTML program well, we usually have only one H1 tag in the HTML code.  It is not that we will display multiple H1 tags.  H1 tag is the same.  We can keep multiple H2 tags depending upon the level of our page.  Now, I can mix my paragraph tag with the heading tags I have written here.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: This is a paragraph.  In this way, I can write a paragraph tag after each heading.  Let's save this and refresh it.  So, this is my main heading.  This is displayed with the help of H1.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: After that, this line should be displayed with the help of H2.  So, this is displayed with the help of H2.  Then, a paragraph.  Then, a heading 2.  Then, a paragraph.

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: Then, a heading 2.  Then, a paragraph.  So, we can see that the text size of the paragraph is small and the headings are usually bigger than the text size of the paragraph.  If I had written H6 instead of H2, which is my smallest heading,  If we save and run this,

chunks.title: Heading Elements
chunks.text: All the headings are not bigger than the paragraph in font size.  But, mostly the headings that we use in practical life are bigger than the paragraph.  Because, paragraph is usually used to display related content and normal text.  Whereas, headings are used to display the main title.

text: Next element is heading element. If I want to create different heading on my page, I already have tags for it. We have 6 different heading tags in HTML. We take them from H1 to H6. H1 is the biggest heading. If I write anything in this, it will be displayed in the largest size. Second tag is H2, third is H3, fourth is H4, fifth is H5 and sixth is H6. These tags decrease in size. If you want to give the smallest heading, it will be in H6 and if you want to give the biggest heading, it will be in H1. These 6 different levels of section headings are represented. Let's see how the heading is represented. Let's say I open a page named Avengers Wikipedia. I open this page. The title of this page is the biggest heading. The smallest heading will be the biggest heading and the next level will be the smallest heading. The same level will be the cast. If I want to write in H1 heading, I will write my main title. The next biggest heading will be in H2. If I want to give any other subheading in H2, I will write it in H3. This is how we create different levels of heading. If I talk about my HTML file, I can write H1 here. This is my opening tag and this is my closing tag. Now I can write my main heading in this. Let's say my main heading is Avengers. This is how I display my main heading. If I want to display their small subheadings, I will display all the subheadings in H2. I can write my Avengers name or Iron Man's name. If you don't know about Avengers, this is a random name that I am writing. I can write Thor here. I can write Hulk in the next line. If I talk about my web browser, the main heading on my page is getting bigger. I wrote this in H1. The headings written in H2 are smaller than the headings in H1. So, we will write our main heading in H1 and smaller than that in H2. If I want to write in H3, I will display anything in a smaller font. This is my smaller heading. Headings in H1, H2, and H3 have their own default size. Headings in H1 will always have the same default size. Headings in H2 will always have the same default size. Headings in H3 will also have the same default size. In the same way, 6 default sizes are already defined for 6 headings. Usually, when we are writing CSS, we can change the font for the rest of the text. But, we do not change the font size for the headings in H1, H2, and H3. Because, when the font size is already defined, we do not play with the rules of HTML. So, we do not change the default size of the headings in maximum cases. If we want to write our HTML program well, we usually have only one H1 tag in the HTML code. It is not that we will display multiple H1 tags. H1 tag is the same. We can keep multiple H2 tags depending upon the level of our page. Now, I can mix my paragraph tag with the heading tags I have written here. This is a paragraph. In this way, I can write a paragraph tag after each heading. Let's save this and refresh it. So, this is my main heading. This is displayed with the help of H1. After that, this line should be displayed with the help of H2. So, this is displayed with the help of H2. Then, a paragraph. Then, a heading 2. Then, a paragraph. Then, a heading 2. Then, a paragraph. So, we can see that the text size of the paragraph is small and the headings are usually bigger than the text size of the paragraph. If I had written H6 instead of H2, which is my smallest heading, If we save and run this, All the headings are not bigger than the paragraph in font size. But, mostly the headings that we use in practical life are bigger than the paragraph. Because, paragraph is usually used to display related content and normal text. Whereas, headings are used to display the main title.
